notes: 2024: ability score increases come from the background (Soldier: Str/Dex/Con), not the species. Applied +2 STR / +1 CON to the standard-array assignment (STR 15->17, CON 14->15). Human traits: Resourceful (Heroic Inspiration), Skillful (1 extra skill = acrobatics), Versatile (1 Origin feat = lucky). Soldier background grants the Savage Attacker origin feat + Athletics/Intimidation. Fighter L1: Fighting Style feat (defense, +1 AC in armor) and 2 skill choices (perception, survival). AC = chain mail 16 + defense 1 = 17. HP = 10 + CON mod(+2) = 12.
